_README: Onboard a client: edit the values below, then run `python3 generate.py` and deploy the dist/ folder. Only this file changes per client. Anything you leave out falls back to a sensible generic default (see generate.py).

reviews.author: Michael D.
reviews.text: Same-day furnace repair on a freezing Chicago night. Fast, professional, and fairly priced. Couldn't ask for more.

reviews.author: Jennifer L.
reviews.text: Technician was on time, explained everything clearly, and had our AC running in under an hour. Highly recommend.

reviews.author: Robert S.
reviews.text: Installed a whole new high-efficiency system. Clean work, great communication, and the house has never been more comfortable.

reviews.author: Amanda K.
reviews.text: Honest assessment and no pushy upsell. They fixed the actual problem and saved us a costly replacement.

reviews.author: David P.
reviews.text: Signed up for their maintenance plan after a great first visit. Reliable, friendly, and thorough every time.

reviews.author: Priya N.
reviews.text: Quick response, fair quote, and excellent duct cleaning. The whole team was courteous and professional.

copy_overrides.HERO_HEADLINE: Chicago's Trusted Heating & Air Conditioning Experts
copy_overrides.HERO_SUBHEADLINE: Fast, reliable, 5-star HVAC service for your home or business.
copy_overrides.SERVICES_INTRO: From AC and furnace repair to new installations, boilers, ductwork, and indoor air quality — our licensed technicians keep Chicago comfortable in every season.
